title: Applications
summary: Aggregate entry point for the PE renormalized-curvature-integral theorem and Pfaffian application.

mathematicalContent.heading: Mathematical role
mathematicalContent.body: Aggregate entry point for the PE renormalized-curvature-integral theorem and Pfaffian application.

mathematicalContent.heading: Formal boundary
mathematicalContent.body: This page describes exactly the declarations present in Ambient/PE/Applications.lean; claims not represented by a declaration are not counted as verified.

references.locator: Proposition 3.7, Proposition 3.10, Lemma 4.1, and Theorems 1.1/1.4 as applicable
references.note: Primary source for the renormalized-curvature-integral mechanism represented by these modules.

limitations: This file establishes syntax, aggregate imports, or an abstract bridge. It must not be read as a derivation of the corresponding geometric theorem from concrete tensor and analytic data.
